title: oxalis sellowii var. alba
intro: Oxalis sellowii var. alba, also known as the White Woods Sorrel, is a variety of the oxalis plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oxalis sellowii var. alba include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. The herbal preparation of this plant can be found in tea, tincture, and decoction forms, and is often used to treat various health conditions.
